blockers.justification: Final certification cannot be granted without current Lighthouse/Core Web Vitals/mobile/accessibility evidence; no measurements are present to certify performance readiness.
seo-launch-safety warns on treatment routes missing section layouts; SMH layout guard passes, so this is a review item rather than a hard failure.
Launch-safety lists high-risk clusters for audit; not a deployment blocker, but should feed post-launch Search Console/Semrush learning.
IndexNow absence affects Bing discovery speed but not core launch safety.
OpenGraph metadata exists; image/title-template refinements can be improved after launch.
Answer foundation warns on lengths but packet QA passes and clinical caveats are preserved.
Contained because the out-of-scope packet remains unapproved; only relevant if activation is requested.
Runtime mutation is intentionally false and alignment registry is sufficient for launch preparation.
